scripts.dev:infra: npm run dev:docker:check && docker compose --profile infra up -d mongodb redis kafka
scripts.dev:tools: npm run dev:docker:check && docker compose --profile tools up -d prometheus grafana jenkins
scripts.dev:up: npm run env:check && npm run dev:infra && npm run dev:docker:check && docker compose --profile apps up -d backend worker kafka-service chart-service
scripts.dev:up:full: npm run env:check && npm run dev:infra && npm run dev:docker:check && docker compose --profile apps --profile logo up -d backend worker logo-service kafka-service chart-service
scripts.dev:down: npm run dev:docker:check && docker compose down
scripts.dev:reset: npm run dev:docker:check && docker compose down -v --remove-orphans
scripts.dev:logs: npm run dev:docker:check && docker compose logs -f --tail=200 backend chart-service mongodb redis kafka
scripts.app:fallback: concurrently -n backend,chart-service,frontend -c green,blue,cyan "node backend/bootstrap-dev.js" "npm --prefix services/chart-service run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.app:docker: npm run dev:up && npm --prefix frontend run dev
scripts.app:full: concurrently -n backend,worker,logo-service,kafka,chart-service,frontend -c green,yellow,magenta,blue,white,cyan "node backend/bootstrap-dev.js" "npm --prefix backend run dev:worker" "npm --prefix services/logo-service run dev" "npm --prefix backend run dev:kafka" "npm --prefix services/chart-service run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix services/logo-service install
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run typecheck
scripts.deploy:auto: docker compose up -d redis kafka mongodb backend worker logo-service kafka-service && npm run validate
